description_long: This object is a cluster of delicate, light pink to white flowers with soft, rounded petals arranged in a somewhat radial pattern. The flowers are surrounded by lush green foliage, with several ovate leaves visible beneath and around the blossoms. The petals appear slightly translucent and overlap each other, creating a layered effect. The stems are slender and green, supporting the flowers above the leafy base. The overall structure is airy and organic, with some flowers more open than others, suggesting a natural, blooming state. The coloration is predominantly soft pastels, with hints of yellow at the flower centers.
description: A cluster of soft pink-white flowers with rounded petals and green ovate leaves, supported by slender stems.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main cluster of open flowers with overlapping petals and dense green foliage beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the layered arrangement of petals and the depth of the foliage, with some flowers partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals more of the stems and the underside of the leaves, with fewer visible flower faces.
description_view_3: Another side view showing the cluster from a different angle, emphasizing the rounded petal shapes and leaf arrangement.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial pattern, overlapping and layered, with some whorled symmetry typical of many ornamental flowers.
